rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Leandro Ferreira
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Logon User-Agent

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Logon User-Agent
id: 95745635-ec42-40ed-8cba-4ad815590197
description: Suspicious user-agents that aren't typically observed in authentication
  events
references:
- https://fieldeffect.com/blog/field-effect-discovers-m365-adversary-in-the-middle-campaign
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Leandro Ferreira
date: 2024-07-16
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: signinlogs
detection:
  selection:
    userAgent|contains:
    - axios/1.
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of the axios HTTP client as part of some software
- Microsoft Power BI
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial-access
